title: Ryan Morrow - Data Science Portfolio
text:
Welcome to my data science portfolio. I’m a Statistics: Data Science student at Brigham Young University interested in using data to understand complex problems and make better decisions.
This site highlights projects where I apply programming, statistics, and visualization to real datasets.


Each project on this site shows a different part of the data science process:

Collecting and preparing data
Exploring trends and patterns
Creating visualizations
Communicating insights clearly

I built this site using Quarto and host it on GitHub Pages.




Programming: Python, Pandas, NumPy
Data Visualization: Matplotlib, Seaborn
Statistical Analysis: Regression, hypothesis testing, exploratory analysis
Tools: Jupyter Notebooks, Git, GitHub, Quarto







A project focused on exploring a dataset, identifying patterns, and communicating key findings with summary statistics and visualizations.



A project showing how I gather, clean, and prepare data from different sources for analysis.



A more complete data science project that brings together data preparation, analysis, and communication of results.



This portfolio is a record of what I’m learning and building as I grow in data science and analytics.

title: About Me
text:
I am a Statistics: Data Science student at Brigham Young University with a strong interest in using data to solve real-world problems. I enjoy learning how data can be collected, cleaned, analyzed, and communicated in ways that lead to better decisions.
My coursework has helped me build skills in programming, statistical analysis, and data visualization, and I am especially interested in applying those skills to practical problems in analytics and business settings.

title: About Me
text:
Skills & Interests

Technical Skills

Programming: Python, R, SQL
Data Analysis: Pandas, NumPy
Visualization: Matplotlib, Seaborn, Tableau
Statistical Methods: Regression, hypothesis testing, exploratory data analysis
Tools: Jupyter Notebooks, Git, GitHub, Quarto, VS Code



Areas of Interest

Data analytics
Statistical modeling
Visualization and communication
Business decision-making with data

title: About Me
text:
Goals
Through my data science journey, I hope to continue strengthening both my technical and communication skills.
My current goals include:

Building strong, well-documented portfolio projects
Gaining experience in data analytics and data science internships
Improving my ability to communicate results clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences

Long term, I want to use data to help organizations make informed decisions and solve meaningful problems.
